Full job description

An auto parts factory worker contributes to the production of components used in vehicles, supporting the automotive manufacturing industry. The role involves participating in assembly processes, handling parts, and ensuring that products are prepared for distribution. Workers operate in a well-organized environment where precision and consistency are important for maintaining product standards. This job provides an opportunity to work in a growing sector with exposure to modern manufacturing systems. The work setting promotes teamwork and efficiency, allowing individuals to build valuable experience over time. Employees are expected to stay focused and contribute to meeting production targets in a timely manner.
If you are willing to work and want to join the automotive production field, you are invited to apply.

Job Type: Full-time

Pay: Rs150,000.00 - Rs180,000.00 per month

Work Location: In person

Artificial Intelligence Intern 
Qatar Mobility Innovations Center (QMIC) – Doha, Qatar  
June 2025 – August 2025 
• Researched and benchmarked state-of-the-art multi-object tracking algorithms for crowded CCTV environments, focusing on 
robustness under occlusions and identity preservation. 
• Analyzed, modified, and optimized trackers such as ByteTrack and BoT-SORT, and evaluated alternatives (OCSORT, JDE, DeepSORT, 
CoTracker-3) to compare detection-based vs end-to-end approaches. 
• Improved tracking performance by retraining person detection models on large-scale CCTV datasets, reducing false positives/negatives 
and enhancing generalization. 
• Designed a custom embedding-based tracker using cosine similarity for data association, contributing to one of the most robust 
tracking pipelines developed during the internship. 
UAV Software Engineer 
Sysverve Aerospace – Rawalpindi, Pakistan  
August 2024 - June 2025 
An aerospace contracting company specializing in autonomous UAVs for reconnaissance tasks. 
• Utilized ArduPilot firmware, pymavlink, and OpenCV-Python to implement vision-based targeting and navigation systems, improving 
UAV targeting accuracy for defense applications. 
• Engineered autonomous flight control systems using ArduPilot SITL for simulations and Gazebo + ROS2 for 3D simulation 
environments, testing UAV behavior in controlled virtual settings before real-world deployment. 
• Designed and tested precision landing algorithms using ground-facing cameras, ensuring reliable and accurate landings on predefined 
landing pads in dynamic environments. 
• Conducted field testing and validation of UAV systems at on-site testing facilities, diagnosing and troubleshooting system errors in 
collaboration with the engineering team to ensure system reliability and mission success. 
Automation Head 
Team Swift – GIKI, Pakistan  
November 2023 – Present 
A student led drone team, participating in international competitions. 
• Led development of onboard vision systems for autonomous drones, achieving real-time detection of ground drop points (~75 ft) 
using a custom-trained YOLO Object Detection model (~92% accuracy). 
• Built a synthetic aerial dataset pipeline and optimized models with TensorRT for edge deployment, reaching ~25 FPS (40 ms) on Jetson 
Nano. 
• Developed end-to-end detection + classification pipeline and contributed to fixed-wing UAV fabrication, multirotor UAV assembly, and 
avionics integration. 
 
PROJECTS 
 
GPS-Denied Navigation using Vision Sensors 
GIKI • Final Year Project 
• Developing a vision-based localization system for drones operating in GPS-denied environments using aerial imagery. 
• Implementing feature-based matching against geo-referenced maps to estimate global position. 
• Designing a tile-based mapping and coordinate projection pipeline for accurate position estimation. 
• Evaluating robustness under real-world variations and optimizing for real-time onboard deployment. 
 
SKILLS 
 
Programming: Python, C++

user_input:
Full job description

About the Studio

We're an AI-native venture builder for the Global South. We partner with founders who know their industry from the inside and co-build their ventures from first idea through to spin-out — covering product, design, engineering, and GTM.

About the Role

This internship is for people who want to work inside a live venture studio — not shadow one. As an Agentic Operator Intern, you'll build and run AI agents that make the studio faster across a specific track: a department or a stage of our co-build programme. Real work, real impact, from day one.

What You'll Do

— Build AI agents and automated workflows for your track

— Operate inside live studio processes alongside the core team

— Own deliverables, not tasks

— Move fast, iterate, and ship things that actually get used

What You Bring

— You've built something with AI, even if it's scrappy

— You think in specifics, not generalities

— You move without waiting to be told

— You can hold multiple things at once without dropping them

— You care about the details

No specific background or degree required. What matters is what you can build.

Your Track

Apply for the track that fits where you want to work.
Department tracks: Operations, Investment, Fellowships, Marketing & Events, Finance, Admin.

Co-build module tracks: M1 Fellow Onboarding, M2 Discovery, M3 Concept & Solution Design, M4 Legal & Entity Setup, M5 Brand & Identity, M6 Product & Technology, M7 Go-to-Market, M8 Fundraising Prep, M9 Operations & Finance.

Engagement

— Full-time, part-time, or volunteer

— Salary upon discussion

— Hybrid, based in Doha

Why This Internship

Most internships put you on the edge of the work. This one puts you inside it. You'll work directly with the founders associate and studio directors, sit inside a co-build programme with real ventures, and use AI to do work that would otherwise take a full team.

We believe innovation should be inclusive and globally distributed. Our team is built on openness, curiosity, and collaboration — with people from across the GCC, Africa, and Southeast Asia. We welcome talent from every background.

All roles are based in Doha, Qatar, with flexible hybrid options.

We believe innovation should be inclusive and globally distributed. Our team is built on openness, curiosity, and collaboration — with people from across the GCC, Africa, and Southeast Asia working together to build meaningful ventures.

All roles are based in Doha, Qatar, with flexible hybrid options and global travel opportunities. We welcome talent from every background to join us in shaping the future of AI-native innovation.

Full job description

Hello,
Greetings from Proztec Qatar! I hope everything is going well with you.

JOB DESCRIPTION

The AI Engineer is responsible for designing, developing, and deploying AI/ML models to solve business problems and drive data-driven decision-making. The role focuses on building scalable machine learning solutions, performing data analysis, and optimizing model performance for real-world applications. The engineer will collaborate with data teams and stakeholders to integrate AI capabilities into business systems.

DUTIES & RESPONSIBILITIES

    Develop, train, and deploy machine learning and AI models
    Perform data analysis, feature engineering, and model evaluation
    Build scalable ML pipelines and integrate models into applications
    Optimize model performance and ensure accuracy and reliability
    Work with large datasets for training and validation
    Collaborate with data engineers and developers for end-to-end solutions
    Monitor model performance and retrain models as required
    Implement best practices for model versioning and deployment
    Stay updated with the latest AI/ML technologies and trends
    Document models, processes, and technical solutions

SKILLS & ABILITIES

    Strong proficiency in Python
    Hands-on experience with ML frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch, etc.)
    Solid understanding of machine learning algorithms and techniques
    Experience in data analysis and data preprocessing
    Knowledge of model deployment and MLOps concepts
    Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

POTENTIAL BACKGROUND

    Minimum 4+ years of experience in AI/ML Engineering
    Experience building and deploying machine learning models in production
    Exposure to enterprise AI use cases and data-driven solutions
    Experience with cloud AI services (AWS, Azure, GCP) is a plus

CERTIFICATIONS (MANDATORY/PREFERRED)

    TensorFlow Developer Certification – Preferred
    Microsoft AI Engineer Associate – Preferred

LANGUAGE REQUIREMENT

    Arabic or Non-Arabic Speaker

WORK LOCATION

    Onshore & Offshore

SOFT SKILLS

    Strong analytical and critical thinking skills
    Effective communication and collaboration abilities
    Ability to work in a fast-paced and evolving environment
    Proactive and innovative mindset
    High ownership and accountability

If you’re interested or have relevant experience, feel free to share your updated CV.

Job Type: Full-time

Pay: QAR18,000.00 - QAR22,000.00 per month

Work Location: In person

Full job description

Hello,
Greetings from Proztec Qatar! I hope everything is going well with you.

JOB DESCRIPTION

The AI Engineer is responsible for designing, developing, and deploying AI/ML models to solve business problems and drive data-driven decision-making. The role focuses on building scalable machine learning solutions, performing data analysis, and optimizing model performance for real-world applications. The engineer will collaborate with data teams and stakeholders to integrate AI capabilities into business systems.

DUTIES & RESPONSIBILITIES

    Develop, train, and deploy machine learning and AI models
    Perform data analysis, feature engineering, and model evaluation
    Build scalable ML pipelines and integrate models into applications
    Optimize model performance and ensure accuracy and reliability
    Work with large datasets for training and validation
    Collaborate with data engineers and developers for end-to-end solutions
    Monitor model performance and retrain models as required
    Implement best practices for model versioning and deployment
    Stay updated with the latest AI/ML technologies and trends
    Document models, processes, and technical solutions

SKILLS & ABILITIES

    Strong proficiency in Python
    Hands-on experience with ML frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch, etc.)
    Solid understanding of machine learning algorithms and techniques
    Experience in data analysis and data preprocessing
    Knowledge of model deployment and MLOps concepts
    Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

POTENTIAL BACKGROUND

    Minimum 4+ years of experience in AI/ML Engineering
    Experience building and deploying machine learning models in production
    Exposure to enterprise AI use cases and data-driven solutions
    Experience with cloud AI services (AWS, Azure, GCP) is a plus

CERTIFICATIONS (MANDATORY/PREFERRED)

    TensorFlow Developer Certification – Preferred
    Microsoft AI Engineer Associate – Preferred

LANGUAGE REQUIREMENT

    Arabic or Non-Arabic Speaker

WORK LOCATION

    Onshore & Offshore

SOFT SKILLS

    Strong analytical and critical thinking skills
    Effective communication and collaboration abilities
    Ability to work in a fast-paced and evolving environment
    Proactive and innovative mindset
    High ownership and accountability

If you’re interested or have relevant experience, feel free to share your updated CV.

Job Type: Full-time

Pay: QAR18,000.00 - QAR22,000.00 per month

Work Location: In person

Full job description

Hello,
Greetings from Proztec Qatar! I hope everything is going well with you.

JOB DESCRIPTION

The AI Engineer is responsible for designing, developing, and deploying AI/ML models to solve business problems and drive data-driven decision-making. The role focuses on building scalable machine learning solutions, performing data analysis, and optimizing model performance for real-world applications. The engineer will collaborate with data teams and stakeholders to integrate AI capabilities into business systems.

DUTIES & RESPONSIBILITIES

    Develop, train, and deploy machine learning and AI models
    Perform data analysis, feature engineering, and model evaluation
    Build scalable ML pipelines and integrate models into applications
    Optimize model performance and ensure accuracy and reliability
    Work with large datasets for training and validation
    Collaborate with data engineers and developers for end-to-end solutions
    Monitor model performance and retrain models as required
    Implement best practices for model versioning and deployment
    Stay updated with the latest AI/ML technologies and trends
    Document models, processes, and technical solutions

SKILLS & ABILITIES

    Strong proficiency in Python
    Hands-on experience with ML frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch, etc.)
    Solid understanding of machine learning algorithms and techniques
    Experience in data analysis and data preprocessing
    Knowledge of model deployment and MLOps concepts
    Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

POTENTIAL BACKGROUND

    Minimum 4+ years of experience in AI/ML Engineering
    Experience building and deploying machine learning models in production
    Exposure to enterprise AI use cases and data-driven solutions
    Experience with cloud AI services (AWS, Azure, GCP) is a plus

CERTIFICATIONS (MANDATORY/PREFERRED)

    TensorFlow Developer Certification – Preferred
    Microsoft AI Engineer Associate – Preferred

LANGUAGE REQUIREMENT

    Arabic or Non-Arabic Speaker

WORK LOCATION

    Onshore & Offshore

SOFT SKILLS

    Strong analytical and critical thinking skills
    Effective communication and collaboration abilities
    Ability to work in a fast-paced and evolving environment
    Proactive and innovative mindset
    High ownership and accountability

If you’re interested or have relevant experience, feel free to share your updated CV.

Job Type: Full-time

Pay: QAR18,000.00 - QAR22,000.00 per month

Work Location: In person
